TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Beji Caid Essebsi ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 11, Beji Caid Essebsi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1926) mrhuw Tunisia ta' misuw hya' ga Beji Caid Essebsi, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas tay 1926, htagan beh sa Sidi Bou Said. ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1958 ga , Essebsi ru Chadlia Saïda Farhat kekong. cyux sazing kneril ru sazing mlikuy laqi nya,lalu nha ga Amel,Salwa,Mohamed Hafedh ru Khélil. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: βeji ʦ~ʨai* es~ɕs~ɕeβs~ɕi rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, βeji ʦ~ʨai* es~ɕs~ɕeβs~ɕi, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw tunis~ɕia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βeji ʦ~ʨai* es~ɕs~ɕeβs~ɕi, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) kawas~ɕ taj ****, ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa s~ɕi*i βou s~ɕai*. rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** ɣa , es~ɕs~ɕeβs~ɕi ru ʦ~ʨħa*lia s~ɕa**a *arħat kekoŋ. ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕaziŋ kneril ru s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi nja,lalu nħa ɣa amel,s~ɕalwa,moħame* ħa*e*ħ ru kħ*lil. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Beji Caid Essebsi ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 11, Beji Caid Essebsi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1926) mrhuw Tunisia ta' misuw hya' ga Beji Caid Essebsi, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas tay 1926, htagan beh sa Sidi Bou Said. ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1958 ga , Essebsi ru Chadlia Saïda Farhat kekong. cyux sazing kneril ru sazing mlikuy laqi nya,lalu nha ga Amel,Salwa,Mohamed Hafedh ru Khélil. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: βeji ʦ~ʨai* es~ɕs~ɕeβs~ɕi rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, βeji ʦ~ʨai* es~ɕs~ɕeβs~ɕi, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw tunis~ɕia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βeji ʦ~ʨai* es~ɕs~ɕeβs~ɕi, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) kawas~ɕ taj ****, ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa s~ɕi*i βou s~ɕai*. rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** ɣa , es~ɕs~ɕeβs~ɕi ru ʦ~ʨħa*lia s~ɕa**a *arħat kekoŋ. ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕaziŋ kneril ru s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj laqi nja,lalu nħa ɣa amel,s~ɕalwa,moħame* ħa*e*ħ ru kħ*lil. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
